title: Jellisy Vanilla
description: A lightweight, client-side modpack that enhances the vanilla Minecraft experience with performance improvements, visual upgrades, and quality-of-life features—all without affecting gameplay or requiring server-side mods.
body:
# **Jellisy's Vanilla Modpack**
### *The perfect way to enhance vanilla Minecraft!*

This modpack is my personal take on how **vanilla Minecraft** should be played—keeping the classic experience intact while adding **quality-of-life improvements**, **performance enhancements**, and **visual upgrades** without breaking the feel of the game.

🔹 **All mods in this pack are 100% client-side**, meaning you can use them on any server without affecting gameplay or requiring server-side mods!

## 🔹 Features
- **✅ Optimized Performance** – **Sodium, Lithium, and Krypton** ensure high FPS and better networking.
- **✅ Visual Enhancements** – **Iris Shaders, Enhanced Block Entities, and BetterF3** for a cleaner HUD and improved graphics.
- **✅ Quality-of-Life Tweaks** – **AppleSkin, Mouse Tweaks, Zoomify, and Neat** improve the vanilla experience.
- **✅ Multiplayer-Friendly** – Fully compatible with online play, featuring **Simple Voice Chat, No Chat Reports, and ViaFabricPlus** for better multiplayer interaction.
- **✅ Immersive Sound & Ambience** – **Presence Footsteps and Melody** enhance the game's audio for a more atmospheric experience.

### 🔹 **100% Vanilla-Friendly!**
This modpack is designed to be used on any server, including **vanilla and modded** ones, without triggering anti-cheat systems or breaking compatibility.

Whether you're playing solo or with friends, this pack **enhances Minecraft** in all the right ways while staying true to its original charm! 🚀

---

**Note about disabled/greyed-out mods**  
Any mods that appear disabled or greyed out in your launcher are either broken for the current Minecraft/modpack version or awaiting an update. They are intentionally left in this state — do not attempt to force-enable them, as this will likely cause crashes. They will become usable again once updated (or may be removed/replaced in a future modpack version).
